function.name: calculate_payroll_deductions
function.description: Calculate Canadian payroll deductions (federal tax, provincial tax, CPP, CPP2, EI) for a single pay period using CRA T4127 formulas. Covers all provinces and territories except Quebec provincial tax. Returns per-period deduction amounts and annual breakdown. All monetary values in CAD.

gross_pay.description: Gross remuneration for the pay period in CAD (e.g., 1000.00)

pay_period.description: Number of pay periods per year. 52=weekly, 26=biweekly, 24=semi-monthly, 12=monthly

federal_claim_code.description: Federal TD1 claim code (0=no personal credits, 1=basic personal amount $16,452, 2-10=higher claim amounts)

provincial_claim_code.description: Provincial TD1 claim code (0=no personal credits, 1=basic personal amount)

bonus.description: Bonus or retroactive pay included this period. Triggers the T4127 differential tax method (TB formula).

rpp_contributions.description: Registered Pension Plan or RRSP contributions deducted per pay period

union_dues.description: Union dues deducted per pay period

prescribed_zone.description: Annual prescribed northern zone deduction (for employees in designated remote areas)

annual_deductions.description: Other annual deductions authorized by CRA (child care expenses, support payments, etc.)

additional_tax.description: Additional tax to deduct per period as requested by employee on TD1 form

ytd_cpp.description: Year-to-date CPP contributions already deducted. Used to calculate remaining CPP owing (annual max $4,230.45 for 2026).

ytd_cpp2.description: Year-to-date CPP2 (second additional) contributions already deducted (annual max $416 for 2026)

ytd_ei.description: Year-to-date EI premiums already deducted. Used to calculate remaining EI owing (annual max $1,123.07 for 2026).

ytd_pensionable.description: Year-to-date pensionable earnings. Used for CPP2 second ceiling calculations.

pensionable_earnings.description: Pensionable earnings for this period. Defaults to gross_pay if not specified.

insurable_earnings.description: Insurable earnings for this period. Defaults to gross_pay if not specified.

dependants_for_reduction.description: Ontario only: dependant amount for Ontario tax reduction calculation

cpp_months.description: Number of months CPP contributions are required (less than 12 for employees turning 18 or 70 mid-year)

function.name: list_provinces
function.description: List the Canadian provinces and territories supported by the payroll deductions calculator. Quebec is excluded because it administers its own provincial tax through Revenu Québec.
